prompt.description: The transformation intent applied to the source image.

source_artifact_id.description: Preferred PopiArt artifact ID for the source image.

image.description: Reference image URL or Base64 string. Accepts one image string or multiple images for fusion when the route supports it.

image_url.description: Compatibility alias for image when the caller still uses a stable image URL field.

reference_artifact_ids.description: Additional PopiArt artifact IDs used as reference images for subject or style fusion.

negative_prompt.description: Optional constraints describing what should not appear in the result.

preserve_composition.description: Prefer to keep the source scene composition and camera relationship when the route supports it.

strength.description: How strongly to transform the source image.

size.description: Optional exact runtime size when supported by the route.

aspect_ratio.description: Portable framing hint such as 1:1, 16:9, or 9:16.

notes.description: Optional extra constraints confirmed with the user.
